summary: During the Brookline Select Board meeting on March 10, 2026, various topics were discussed including preparations for upcoming events, community development projects, and budget concerns related to housing and public services. There was a notable focus on efforts to modernize the green line program and improve accessibility at train stations. The board also reviewed grant proposals and the implications of potential zoning changes in the Chestnut Hill commercial area. Additionally, the town discussed plans to enhance community engagement in budgetary matters and streamlined communications with residents about town projects. The meeting concluded with plans to continue these discussions in future sessions. For further details, timestamps range from [17:35] to [422:54] in the transcript.
title: Brookline Select Board Meeting - March 10, 2026
